summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScrapOS ERP system. Backend APIs 96.7% functional, frontend UI fully operational with successful user flows.

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle button not found in UI

console_errors.issue: React error boundary warning in SelectItem component

passed_tests: Seed data button loads UAE sample data
Navigation to all major modules (Weighbridge, Inventory, Purchases, Sales)
Master data pages (Companies, Customers, Suppliers) load correctly
Weighbridge page with New Entry functionality
Companies page with New Company functionality
All backend CRUD operations for master data
Inventory and stock management APIs working
Purchase and sales module APIs operational
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement missing VAT Report API endpoint (/api/reports/vat) and add theme toggle functionality to UI. Consider adding error boundary for SelectItem component.
